evidence: 5715h indexes this table with (VV6F & 07h) * 5; 56CE-56D3 copies five bytes to EF7C..EF80 because uPD7810 BLOCK repeats until C underflows. FE1 at 09AC loads TM1 from EF7E + VV81 and wraps VV81 when it reaches VV7D. VV7C=00h selects 7005h record 0, whose 0x0D/0x0D timing profile matches Tables 2-12/2-13 x3 900 PPS 2-2.
notes: Third sequence byte is copied but not used while VV7D=02h.

evidence: 09AC-09BC cycles TM1 through three values: 15h, 15h, 16h. VV7C=01h selects 7005h record 1, whose 0x0D/0x0D timing profile matches Tables 2-12/2-13 x2 600 PPS 2-2.
notes: Uses faster TM1 cycle bytes than index 4 while selecting the same runtime timing profile.

evidence: Same two-entry TM1 sequence as record 0, with VV7C=02h selecting 7005h record 2. Its 0x1A/0x1A timing profile at 7127h/715Bh matches Tables 2-14/2-15 x1.5 900 PPS 1-2; raw state bytes carry bit7, and 540Dh maps that bit to F003 bit0 before masking the state byte for current-state dispatch.
notes: Located 1-2 timing profile; no longer an unresolved selector-only row.

evidence: Same three-entry TM1 sequence as record 1, with VV7C=03h selecting 7005h record 3. Its 0x1A/0x1A timing profile at 718Fh/71C3h matches Tables 2-14/2-15 x1 600 PPS 1-2; raw state bytes carry bit7 for F003 bit0 excitation selection.
notes: Uses faster TM1 cycle bytes while selecting the x1 600 PPS runtime timing profile.

evidence: 09AC-09BC cycles TM1 through two 20h values. VV7C=01h selects 7005h record 1, whose runtime profile matches Tables 2-12/2-13 x2 600 PPS 2-2.
notes: Third sequence byte is copied but not used while VV7D=02h.

evidence: 09AC-09BC cycles TM1 through three values: 2Ah, 2Ah, 2Ch. VV7C=03h selects 7005h record 3, the Tables 2-14/2-15 x1 600 PPS 1-2 runtime profile; raw state bytes carry bit7 for the F003 bit0 excitation side effect.
notes: Decoded as the x1 1-2 timing profile combined with slower TM1 cycle bytes.

evidence: 563Ch ORs VV6F.2, so an incoming low bits 010b select this record in the normal scheduler; VV6F.1 halves EF64 into EF79. VV7C=03h selects 7005h record 3, the Tables 2-14/2-15 x1 600 PPS 1-2 runtime profile.
notes: Located 1-2 timing profile; no longer an unresolved selector-only row.

evidence: 09AC-09BC cycles TM1 through three identical 20h values. VV7C=04h selects 7005h record 4, a 0x1A/0x1A bit7/F003 1-2-family profile with about 2.50 ms constant timing.
notes: Decoded as a real slower/intermediate profile rather than an unresolved x1 row.
